channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gronk-a-Mania set to run wild over WrestleMania weekend
item.description: Rob Gronkowski grew up emulating his sports heroes in school, never shy about unleashing a Stone Cold Stunner or dropping a People’s Elbow on his roughhousing friends.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: March Maddening? Timing of transfer portal opening can be tough on coaches still in the tourney
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Coaches still playing in the NCAA Tournament are having to split their time between preparing their teams for the Sweet 16 and talking to potential transfers who have entered the portal. Such is life in college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: JuJu Watkins’ season-ending knee injury leaves a ‘big void’ in women’s NCAA Tournament
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley sent JuJu Watkins a text as soon as she saw the star Southern California sophomore suffer a season-ending knee injury on Monday night. It was “really tough” to see Watkins in pain, the South Carolina women's basketball coach said.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL legend Randy White fights fentanyl after personal tragedy
item.description: Jesse Dempsey, a professional snowboarder, unknowingly took a pill laced with fentanyl, believing it was a prescribed painkiller for a knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dorman, NewsNation

item.title: Texas Tech rallies from 16 points down to beat Arkansas 85-83 in first OT game in March Madness
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Darrion Williams could barely make a shot for the first 30 minutes. He didn't miss when it mattered most, sending Texas Tech to an improbable spot in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alabama makes March Madness record 25 3s and romps past BYU 113-88 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Alabama broke the 35-year-old March Madness record for 3-pointers with 25 and Mark Sears scored 30 of his 34 points on 3s, a relentless long-range spree that ushered the second-seeded Crimson Tide past BYU 113-88 on Thursday night in an NCAA Tournament East Region semifinal.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto strikes out with 2 on to end Mets debut and 3-1 loss to Astros
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — With a chance to make a late splash in his New York Mets debut, Juan Soto came up empty. After signing the biggest contract in baseball history last offseason, the slugger came to bat with two runners aboard and the Mets down by two in the ninth inning Thursday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bryce Harper hears boos again at Nationals Park and homers again on opening day for the Phillies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The jeers greeted the announcement of Bryce Harper's name during pregame introductions at Nationals Park on Thursday. And when he stepped to the plate in the top of the first inning. Again in the fourth.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL prospect Desmond Watson seeks to become heaviest player drafted in league history
item.description: Football linemen are typical among the biggest athletes on a team, but former Florida defender Desmond Watson's size and strength are exceptional.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gosh! 'Napoleon Dynamite' star Jon Heder dishes out tater tots ahead of BYU's Sweet 16 game
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Napoleon Dynamite served tater tots on a plate instead of stuffing them in his pocket — and threw his Sweet 16 vote behind BYU.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox hammer Angels in lopsided Opening Day win
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The weather on White Sox Opening Day mirrored their franchise outlook heading into 2025. Murky, gray and dreary with little to be excited about besides the fact baseball season is all the way back. Good thing the White Sox played well in spite of the melancholy conditions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Environmental activists to protest Dodgers' home opener over partnership with embattled oil company
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers will see a group of protesters kick off opening day on Thursday because of the team's partnership with an embattled oil company.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: World Series champion has 1 major worry for the Mets going into the season
item.description: World Series champion AJ Pierzynski expressed concern over the New York Mets starting pitching going into the season during an appearance on OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia receiver Nitro Tuggle reached speeds of over 100 mph before reckless driving arrest: report
item.description: The latest Georgia football player to be arrested on driving-related crimes was said to be traveling speeds of over 100 mph before his arrest, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Florida coach brings team to famed local staple ahead of March Madness matchup in SF
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Florida head coach Todd Golden is excited to be back in San Francisco this week -- a city where he began his head coaching career. Golden leads the No. 1 seed Gators for their Sweet 16 matchup Thursday against No. 4 seed Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFL player charged after 190 dogs seized from Oklahoma dog fighting venture
item.description: An Oklahoma man is facing federal charges after officials seized 190 dogs from an animal fighting venture, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, WGN 9

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The MLB teams with the highest
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: How the San Diego Padres got their name
item.description: The San Diego Padres' name is a tribute to the city's history, with the team's name coming from the Franciscan Friars who founded the area.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sacramento State to hire Mike Bibby as basketball coach, AP source says
item.description: Former Sacramento Kings star Mike Bibby will be hired as the basketball coach at Sacramento State, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears sign DB Nick McCloud to 1-year contract
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed defensive back Nick McCloud to a one-year contract, bringing his NFL experience from the Bengals, Giants, and 49ers to the team.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Padres Opening Day: What's new inside Petco Park
item.description: The baseball season has finally returned and San Diego Padres fans are getting amped to set foot back inside Petco Park. Here's what is new for fans inside the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hall, Kitts rally top-seeded South Carolina to Sweet 16 in 64-53 March Madness win over Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Bree Hall had 11 points and Chloe Kitts scored all her 10 points in the second half as top seed South Carolina pulled away after trailing at halftime to beat ninth-seeded Indiana 64-53 on Sunday in the women’s NCAA Tournament and reach the Sweet 16 for the 11th straight time.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump makes NCAA men's wrestling championships his latest sports-focused trip
item.description: BRIDGEWATER, N.J. (AP) — President Donald Trump attended the NCAA wrestling championships on Saturday night for the second time in three years, the latest example of how he has mostly limited travel early in his new term to trips built around sports events.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LSU ends San Diego's NCAA run
item.description: The San Diego State Aztecs and LSU Tigers are facing off Saturday night in San Diego's final push in the NCAA tournament. Here's how to watch.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Virginia hires VCU coach Ryan Odom, whose father was a Cavaliers assistant
item.description: Williams named VCU coach Ryan Odom — whose father was a Cavaliers assistant and who handed the program its most historic and crushing defeat in the 2018 NCAA Tournament — as the full-time replacement to Tony Bennett on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Major League Baseball removes references to 'diversity' from MLB Careers home page
item.description: Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred, who launched a Diversity Pipeline Program in 2016, said following an owners meeting in Palm Beach, Florida, last month that MLB was evaluating the interpretation of law coming from the federal government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
